rationale: Educ. Code §45.112 governs investment contracts for school district debt service fund proceeds. It is procedurally unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district, including a junior college district or community college district, may enter into a contract with a term not to exceed seven years to purchase investments with the proceeds of taxes levied or to be levied by the district for the purpose of paying debt service on bonds issued by the district.
_note: No textual or operational conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this investment-contract statute.
